description:
*Thanks to Rocket Money for sponsoring this video!*
Get started with Rocket Money for FREE ► https://rocketmoney.com/styletheorists

Around Black Friday 2023, TikTok shut down THOUSANDS of small business shops on its platform without warning. Yes, those small TikTok businesses that SarahGrace, HopeScope, Mia Maples, and other creators love to buy from and make haul videos about every week... they're GONE! It sounds kind of shady and downright disturbing, right? But what if we told you TikTok just saved those small businesses MILLIONS of dollars? Here’s the lowdown on the TikTok Shop scandal…

description:
happy vlogmas day 25! ♥️🎄MERRY CHRISTMAS!! welcome to my christmas haul (+ 18th birthday haul)!! ending this vlogmas year with SO much gratitude🫶 grateful for all these gifts, grateful that my family and i are healthy and happy, & grateful for this amazing life that God’s given me!! thank you guys so much for tuning in this vlogmas!! i hope you enjoyed & stay tuned for Canada and New Year’s content🥰💋 i love you all so much!!
